RenoiseScriptingTool.Name: moon eyes for karen
RenoiseScriptingTool.Author: kirtan teg singh
RenoiseScriptingTool.Description: moon eyes for karen — generates "mapas" (pattern sequences) from predefined pattern orders. Maps: back2back, Citibank, unaAlcoholic4, AltoVoltaje, dictadera, Cynthia, bandersnatch, Boogie 'L Graso, taxiista, Ascensores, Amperes, HazaratAbraham, Leyes, reactor, donuts. Optional green matrix colors + names on back2back.
